'''âz-sh-dh''' ('''kazashadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maister|maister]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maister|maister]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-sh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kazashadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizashadh|thizashadh]] || [[word:jizashadh|jizashadh]] || [[word:shizashadh|shizashadh]] || [[word:kizashadh|kizashadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzashadh|thuthuzashadh]] || [[word:jujuzashadh|jujuzashadh]] || [[word:shushuzashadh|shushuzashadh]] || [[word:kukuzashadh|kukuzashadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzashadh|thuzashadh]] || [[word:juzashadh|juzashadh]] || [[word:shuzashadh|shuzashadh]] || [[word:kuzashadh|kuzashadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzashadh|thuzashadh]] || [[word:juzashadh|juzashadh]] || [[word:shuzashadh|shuzashadh]] || [[word:kuzashadh|kuzashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezashadh|thezashadh]] || [[word:jezashadh|jezashadh]] || [[word:shezashadh|shezashadh]] || [[word:kezashadh|kezashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozashadh|thothozashadh]] || [[word:jojozashadh|jojozashadh]] || [[word:shoshozashadh|shoshozashadh]] || [[word:kokozashadh|kokozashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozashadh|thozashadh]] || [[word:jozashadh|jozashadh]] || [[word:shozashadh|shozashadh]] || [[word:kozashadh|kozashadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozashadh|thozashadh]] || [[word:jozashadh|jozashadh]] || [[word:shozashadh|shozashadh]] || [[word:kozashadh|kozashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzashadh|thĂŠzashadh]] || [[word:jĂŠzashadh|jĂŠzashadh]] || [[word:shĂŠzashadh|shĂŠzashadh]] || [[word:kĂŠzashadh|kĂŠzashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazashadh|thathazashadh]] || [[word:jajazashadh|jajazashadh]] || [[word:shashazashadh|shashazashadh]] || [[word:kakazashadh|kakazashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazashadh|thazashadh]] || [[word:jazashadh|jazashadh]] || [[word:shazashadh|shazashadh]] || [[word:kazashadh|kazashadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazashadh|thazashadh]] || [[word:jazashadh|jazashadh]] || [[word:shazashadh|shazashadh]] || [[word:kazashadh|kazashadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazashadh|shazashadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazashadh|goshazashadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazashadh|gokishazashadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazashadhnĂŒ|shazashadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazashadhnknĂŒ|goshazashadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashadhnĂŒ|gokishazashadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazashadhshĂ«|shazashadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkshĂ«|goshazashadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazashadhshĂ«|gokishazashadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashadhro|shazashadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkro|goshazashadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashadhro|gokishazashadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashadhmu|shazashadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkmu|goshazashadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashadhmu|gokishazashadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazashadhsher|shazashadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazashadhnksher|goshazashadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazashadhsher|gokishazashadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazashadhng|shazashadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkng|goshazashadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazashadhng|gokishazashadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazashadhya|shazashadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkya|goshazashadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazashadhya|gokishazashadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazashadhyam|shazashadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkyam|goshazashadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazashadhyam|gokishazashadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazashadhnĂŒshĂ«|shazashadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazashadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazashadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazashadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazashadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashadhnĂŒro|shazashadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashadhnknĂŒro|goshazashadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashadhnĂŒro|gokishazashadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashadhnĂŒmu|shazashadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashadhnknĂŒmu|goshazashadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashadhnĂŒmu|gokishazashadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazashadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shazashadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazashadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazashadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashadhshĂ«ro|shazashadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkshĂ«ro|goshazashadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashadhshĂ«ro|gokishazashadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashadhshĂ«mu|shazashadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkshĂ«mu|goshazashadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashadhshĂ«mu|gokishazashadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazashadhronĂŒ|shazashadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkronĂŒ|goshazashadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashadhronĂŒ|gokishazashadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazashadhroshĂ«|shazashadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkroshĂ«|goshazashadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazashadhroshĂ«|gokishazashadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazashadhromu|shazashadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkromu|goshazashadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazashadhromu|gokishazashadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazashadhmunĂŒ|shazashadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkmunĂŒ|goshazashadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazashadhmunĂŒ|gokishazashadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazashadhmushĂ«|shazashadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkmushĂ«|goshazashadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazashadhmushĂ«|gokishazashadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazashadhmuro|shazashadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazashadhnkmuro|goshazashadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazashadhmuro|gokishazashadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
